name: stateful-superpowers
description: Stateful skills library for Claude Code: a self-driving brainstorm → plan → TDD → review workflow that remembers your project's language and key decisions across sessions. Based on Superpowers by Jesse Vincent and Matt Pocock's engineering skills.

interface.shortDescription: Planning, TDD, debugging, and delivery workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use Stateful Superpowers to guide agent work through brainstorming, implementation planning, test-driven development, systematic debugging, parallel execution, code review, and finish-the-branch workflows — while remembering your project's language and key decisions across sessions.
defaultPrompt: I've got an idea for something I'd like to build.
Let's add a feature to this project.
